---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like?
A clear description of the feature.

## Use case
What problem does this solve? Who would use it?

## Proposed tool name
`my_new_tool`

## Expected input/output
```json
// Input params
{ "chain": "solana", "label": "group1" }

// Expected output
{ "status": "success", "result": "..." }
```

## Additional context
Any notes, related tools, or examples from other projects.
